---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**The problem**
What's missing or frustrating today? Who does this affect — doctors, patients, both?

**Proposed solution**
How you'd see it working. Mockups / sketches welcome.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about and why this one is better.

**HCI / clinical relevance** (if applicable)
Does this come from a known usability principle, accessibility need, or clinical workflow gap?

**Additional context**
Screenshots, links to related questionnaires/standards, etc.
